channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: harry0703 /MoneyPrinterTurbo | Python | N/A
item.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

item.title: bytedance /deer-flow | Python | N/A
item.description: An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skills and subagents, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

item.title: aquasecurity /trivy | Go | N/A
item.description: Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

item.title: louis-e /arnis | Rust | N/A
item.description: Generate any location from the real world in Minecraft with a high level of detail.

item.description: 基于多智能体LLM的中文金融交易框架 - TradingAgents中文增强版

item.title: browser-use /browser-use | Python | N/A
item.description: 🌐 Make websites accessible for AI agents. Automate tasks online with ease.

item.title: systemd /systemd | C | N/A
item.description: The systemd System and Service Manager

item.title: Crosstalk-Solutions /project-nomad | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

item.title: jarrodwatts /claude-hud | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress

item.title: affaan-m /everything-claude-code | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

item.description: Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks
